metrics.name: Successful dribbles per 90
metrics.description: Successful dribbles per 90 minutes (proxy for inverted progressive runs)

metrics.name: Dribble success rate, %
metrics.description: Percentage of dribble attempts that are successful

metrics.name: Passes to final third per 90
metrics.description: Accurate passes into the final third per 90 minutes (proxy for passes to penalty area)

metrics.name: Goal conversion, %
metrics.description: Percentage of shots converted into goals (proxy for finishing efficiency)

metrics.name: Key passes per 90
metrics.description: Passes leading directly to a shot per 90 minutes

metrics.name: Pass to assist per 90
metrics.description: Passes directly leading to a goal assist per 90 minutes

metrics.name: Shots on target per 90
metrics.description: Shots on target per 90 minutes (proxy for box touches and dangerous actions)

metrics.name: Was fouled per 90
metrics.description: Times fouled per 90 minutes (reflects threat and off-ball movement attracting fouls)

metrics.name: Total duels per 90
metrics.description: Total duels engaged per 90 minutes (proxy for pressing engagement)

core_10_model.scoring_method: Each metric is computed from Sofascore raw stats per the computation formula, then converted to percentile (0-100). For inverse metrics (higher_is_better: false), the inverted percentile is used. Category score = average percentile of metrics in that category. Final score = sum(category_score * category_weight).
